presets.name: ChatGPT — Prompt Engineering
presets.basePrompt: Improve the following prompt for better LLM performance. Analyze: clarity, specificity, structure, and potential ambiguities. Provide: revised prompt, reasoning for changes, and a rubric for evaluation. [Constraints: Follow chain-of-thought best practices. Include few-shot examples if applicable.]

presets.name: Claude — Ethical Dilemma
presets.basePrompt: Present a nuanced analysis of the trolley problem in the context of autonomous vehicle programming. Consider: utilitarian vs deontological frameworks, legal liability, public trust, and edge cases. [Constraints: Steel-man both sides. Identify logical fallacies in common arguments.]

presets.name: Gemini Flash — Data Analysis
presets.basePrompt: Analyze the following dataset and provide: 1) Descriptive statistics, 2) Trend identification, 3) Anomaly detection, 4) Predictive insights, 5) Visualization recommendations. [Constraints: Note confidence intervals. Flag data quality issues.]

presets.name: Kimi — Historical Analysis
presets.basePrompt: Compare the Industrial Revolution and the AI Revolution across: economic impact, labor displacement, societal adaptation, regulatory response, and long-term outcomes. [Constraints: Use primary sources where possible. Note historiographical debates.]

presets.name: GLM — Medical Literature Review
presets.basePrompt: Review recent literature on mRNA vaccine technology. Summarize: mechanism of action, efficacy data, safety profiles, and emerging applications. [Constraints: Cite DOIs. Note study limitations. Distinguish peer-reviewed from preprint.]

presets.name: MiniMax — Character Development
presets.basePrompt: Develop a complex antagonist for a cyberpunk novel. Include: backstory, motivation, moral ambiguity, relationship to protagonist, and character arc. [Constraints: Avoid cartoonish evil. Show vulnerability. Make motivations relatable.]
